outcome.notes: Operator control is stuck on the default '+' and does not respond to Up/Down arrow keys; cannot select '-' via keyboard. The calc mechanism itself works: typing '-2' into the second number succeeded (step 3), and Calculate/Enter ran correctly, producing 1 (3 + (-2) = 1) instead of the expected Result: 5. Issue is isolated to keyboard-driven operator selection. Step 5 (clear/reset) was not reached.

steps.description: Operator field stuck on default '+'. Up/Down arrow keys do not change it to '-'. Tab focus and typing work elsewhere, but this control does not respond to keyboard arrow input.
